title: A Blade Between Us
description: Kestrel was raised to kill the heir of the rival house — trained for it since she was eight, sharpened for it like a knife. She finally has him alone, unarmed, asleep. The trouble is that he opens his eyes, recognises her, and says he has been waiting his whole life for someone honest enough to come for him. Enemies-to-lovers romantasy with a body count and a slow, dangerous burn.
